description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Update lilac.yaml docs that triggers on push to the master branch when the lilac-yaml-schema.yaml file changes. In an ubuntu-latest job, check out the code, set up Python 3.8 and Node.js 14, install dependencies, configure git, update documentation with make, commit changes, and then check out another repository using a deploy key, copy the updated schema file, and commit and push changes if necessary.
